title: Knightllager
body:
# This datapack packaged as a mod overwrites the armors, weapons, food that the Guard Villagers spawn with.

Currently, 5 sets of armors (from bad to good) and all iron weapons + heavy crossbow are used from the [Epic Knights](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-armor-and-weapons) mod, Guard Villagers will now also spawn with other food items as well instead of just only bread.

**For balancing purposes, I recommend having Guard Villagers Item drop chance at 0.**

**This mod was made for the 1.21.1 version of [Fantasy MC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fantasy-minecraft-fabric)**
